90.$description: Charcoal one step lighter — for card/section surfaces on dark canvas.

70.$description: Charcoal mid — de-emphasized text on light surfaces (on-paper-muted).

base.$description: Brand ivory — default text on dark canvas, default surface on light canvas. Near-neutral warm off-white (HSL 60°, 14%, 98%) — minimal yellow pigment for a cooler, more porcelain feel.

cream.$description: Ivory one step lighter — alternate light canvas where cream needs to read brighter than the raised primitive (used by recipe overrides). Keeps the same hue at a touch higher lightness.

raised.$description: Cream one step darker — for raised surfaces on light canvas (mirrors charcoal.90 on dark). Same hue as base, ~3 lightness steps darker.

soft.$description: Patagonia lightened — secondary text / accent on dark surfaces.

deep.$description: Patagonia darkened — high-contrast text on light surfaces.

base.$description: Brand red — warmth accent and emphasis.
Plasma pink — critical accent. For disclaimers, alerts, controversial statements.
